headline: Poison Chef 🍳☠️ Slays 79 UK Souls 💀🌍 but Canada Plea 🍆⚖️ Slaps Wrist
text: Kenneth Law 🍳💀 the 'Poison Seller' just PLEADED GUILTY 🥺🔒 to 14 counts of AIDING SUICIDES 💔🪦 in Ontario after peddling toxic chemicals online to 40 countries 🌍📦 – about 1,200 packages of DEATH JUICE 🧪😵 that he sold on suicide forums like some twisted Uber Eats 🍔☠️ for the end game. Former chef turned dark web Grim Reaper 👨‍🍳🖤, Law hooked up customers worldwide but the UK got the rawest deal – 79 Britons ☠️🇬🇧 allegedly offed themselves with his stuff, yet CPS said 'nah fam' to UK charges cuz extradition would take YEARS 📅😩 and double jeopardy could block it all. They cut a deal so his Canadian sentence accounts for the British deaths instead, calling it 'quickest route to justice' 🚀⚖️. Families are RAGING 😡🔥 – Ashtyn Prosser-Blake's mum Kim said her 19-year-old super happy gentle soul 🕊️💔 who battled mental health post-COVID just wanted to help the underdogs 🐶 but Law's poison ended the story. David Parfett's 22-year-old football-mad son Thomas ⚽😢 paid £50 for the substance and was found in a Sunbury hotel in 2021, now dad wants a full PUBLIC INQUIRY 🧐📜 cuz 'the toll is astonishing' with kids dying and no coordinated stop to this mess. Law got nabbed in May 2023 after a Times sting 🕵️‍♂️📰 where a journo posed as buyer and Law straight-up coached on 'best ensure death' 😈📋 – ran multiple sites hawking suicide kits like Amazon Prime for despair. Sentencing starts Sept 23 with victim statements, max 14 years under Canadian code 📜⏳ but UK families say he should face charges here too. Home Office sending thoughts & prayers while promising to intercept the poison packages 🛑📦. No solace for grieving parents when the chef who sold death gets a slap on the wrist instead of full reckoning 💔🍽️ – this ain't just a Canadian problem, it's a global tragedy that needs real answers before more lives get served cold ☠️🌎.
